1.service: Control of DHW storage charging (with direct electric heating or integrated electric heat pump)

functionality_levels.level_1: Automatic control on / off and scheduled charging enable
functionality_levels.level_2: Automatic control on / off and scheduled charging enable and multi- sensor storage management
functionality_levels.level_3: Automatic charging control based on local availability of renewables or information from electricity grid (DR, DSM)

2.service: Control of DHW storage charging (using hot water generation)

functionality_levels.level_1: Automatic control on / off and scheduled charging enable
functionality_levels.level_2: Automatic on/off control, scheduled charging enable and demand-based supply temperature control or multi-sensor storage management
functionality_levels.level_3: DHW production system capable of automatic charging control based on external signals (e.g. from district heating grid)

3.service: Control of DHW storage charging (with solar collector and supplymentary heat generation)

functionality_levels.level_0: Manual selected control of solar energy or heat generation
functionality_levels.level_1: Automatic control of solar storage charge (Prio. 1) and supplementary storage charge
functionality_levels.level_2: Automatic control of solar storage charge (Prio. 1) and supplementary storage charge and demand-oriented supply or multi-sensor storage management
functionality_levels.level_3: Automatic control of solar storage charge (Prio. 1) and supplementary storage charge, demand-oriented supply and return temperature control and multi-sensor storage management

4.service: Sequencing in case of different DHW generators

functionality_levels.level_0: Priorities only based on running time
functionality_levels.level_1: Control according to fixed priority list: e.g. based on rated energy efficiency
functionality_levels.level_2: Control according to dynamic priority list (based on current energy efficiency, carbon emissions and capacity of generators, e.g. solar, geothermal heat, cogeneration plant, fossil fuels)
functionality_levels.level_3: Control according to dynamic priority list (based on current AND predicted load, energy efficiency, carbon emissions  and capacity of generators)
functionality_levels.level_4: Control according to dynamic priority list (based on current AND predicted load, energy efficiency, carbon emissions, capacity of generators AND external signals from grid)

5.service: Report information regarding domestic hot water performance

functionality_levels.level_1: Indication of actual values (e.g. temperatures, submetering energy usage)
functionality_levels.level_3: Performance evaluation including forecasting and/or benchmarking
functionality_levels.level_4: Performance evaluation including forecasting and/or benchmarking; also including predictive management and fault detection
